name: setSignalDword
description: Team-internal wrapper around setSignal() that accepts a dword value and
writes it to a typed signal handle. Validates value range against the
signal min/max before issuing the write. Logs the operation to the
central telemetry bus for offline replay.
Set the EngineSpeed signal to 1500 rpm from a CAN Rx handler.

note: For internal use only. Do not call from test modules.
